transcript:
CALLER: Hi, cancel karna hai mera appointment. Actually teen appointments hain — mujhe, meri wife ko, aur bete ko.
AGENT: Teen appointments! Zaroor. Ek ek karke details lijiye mujhse.
CALLER: Main hoon Anil Godbole, meri wife Sushma Godbole, aur beta Tejas Godbole. Teeno ka kal tha alag alag departments mein.
AGENT: Dekh raha hoon... haan, teeno records mil gaye. Sab kal ke hain. Teeno cancel kar doon?
CALLER: Haan, urgent travel aa gaya humara.
AGENT: Samajh gaya. Teeno appointments cancel ho gayi — Anil, Sushma, aur Tejas Godbole. SMS jaayega confirm karne ke liye. Safe travel!
CALLER: Thank you, wapas aakar nayi date lenge.
